title: ActiveCampaign vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Brevo: pricing, features, automation, and CRM capabilities to find the best email marketing tool for your business.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Brevo are both robust email marketing platforms with CRM capabilities, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels at advanced automation and lead scoring, while Brevo offers a generous free tier and multi-channel communication tools including WhatsApp and live chat. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize sophisticated automation workflows or budget-friendly multi-channel marketing.

comparison_table.tool_a: Full CRM with lead scoring and site tracking
comparison_table.tool_b: CRM included with transactional email API
Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat

choose_a_if: You need advanced automation and sophisticated lead scoring for complex sales funnels
You're an e-commerce business requiring detailed customer tracking and dynamic content
You want a traditional CRM-first platform with deep automation capabilities
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want a powerful free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers
You need multi-channel marketing including WhatsApp and live chat beyond email
You want a transactional email API for sending automated system notifications

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is superior for advanced automation, lead scoring, and comprehensive CRM features, making it ideal for complex sales operations. Brevo is better if you need a free tier, multi-channel communication (WhatsApp, live chat), and want to minimize costs while getting started.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, especially for startups and small businesses. It offers a free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers, while ActiveCampaign has no free option and starts at $15/month. For paid plans, Brevo begins at $25/month compared to ActiveCampaign's $15/month, but Brevo's free tier often eliminates the need to pay initially.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Both platforms support standard email formats and most can export/import contact lists and campaign data. However, you may lose some custom automation workflows since ActiveCampaign's advanced automation engine differs from Brevo's. It's recommended to plan your migration carefully and test workflows before fully switching.
